page_content:
CLAS308 The Classics in Context (1-3 Credits)

A Study Abroad course which introduces students to the topography, archaeology and culture of the ancient Mediterranean world. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Classics department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

CLAS309 Special Topics in Classical Literature (3 Credits) Readings in translation. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
